runs.output_code:
<script setup lang="ts">
import {
  Button,
  ControlledCheckbox,
  ControlledInput,
  ControlledRadioGroup,
  ControlledTextarea,
  Form,
  FormActions,
  FormFields,
} from "elements";
import {
  registrationSchema,
  registrationInitialValues,
  type RegistrationFormValues,
} from "../types";

const roleOptions = [
  { value: "user" as const, label: "User" },
  { value: "admin" as const, label: "Admin" },
  { value: "contributor" as const, label: "Contributor" },
];

const frequencyOptions = [
  { value: "daily" as const, label: "Daily" },
  { value: "weekly" as const, label: "Weekly" },
  { value: "monthly" as const, label: "Monthly" },
];

const actions = {
  onSubmit: async (values: RegistrationFormValues) => {
    console.log("submitted:", values);
    return values;
  },
};
</script>

<template>
  <Form :initial-values="registrationInitialValues" :form-schema="registrationSchema" :actions="actions">
    <FormFields v-slot="{ form, resetGeneralError }">
      <ControlledInput
        name="username"
        label="Username"
        placeholder="Enter your username"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <ControlledInput
        name="email"
        label="Email"
        type="email"
        placeholder="Enter your email"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <ControlledRadioGroup
        name="role"
        label="Role"
        :options="roleOptions"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <ControlledInput
        v-if="form.values.role === 'contributor'"
        name="otherInfo"
        label="Other Info"
        placeholder="Describe your contribution"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <ControlledCheckbox
        name="newsletter"
        label="Subscribe to newsletter"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <ControlledRadioGroup
        v-if="form.values.newsletter"
        name="frequency"
        label="Newsletter Frequency"
        :options="frequencyOptions"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <ControlledTextarea
        name="bio"
        label="Bio"
        placeholder="Tell us about yourself..."
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />
    </FormFields>

    <FormActions v-slot="{ form: formCtx, isValid }" class="mt-6">
      <Button
        type="submit"
        class="w-full"
        :disabled="!isValid || formCtx?.isSubmitting.value"
      >
        Submit
      </Button>
    </FormActions>
  </Form>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import {
  Button,
  ControlledCheckbox,
  ControlledInput,
  ControlledRadioGroup,
  ControlledTextarea,
  Form,
  FormActions,
  FormFields,
} from "elements";
import {
  registrationSchema,
  registrationInitialValues,
  type RegistrationFormValues,
} from "../types";

const roleOptions = [
  { value: "user" as const, label: "User" },
  { value: "admin" as const, label: "Admin" },
  { value: "contributor" as const, label: "Contributor" },
];

const frequencyOptions = [
  { value: "daily" as const, label: "Daily" },
  { value: "weekly" as const, label: "Weekly" },
  { value: "monthly" as const, label: "Monthly" },
];

const actions = {
  onSubmit: async (values: RegistrationFormValues) => {
    console.log("submitted:", values);
    return values;
  },
};
</script>

<template>
  <Form :initial-values="registrationInitialValues" :form-schema="registrationSchema" :actions="actions">
    <FormFields v-slot="{ form, resetGeneralError }">
      <ControlledInput
        name="username"
        label="Username"
        placeholder="Enter your username"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <ControlledInput
        name="email"
        label="Email"
        type="email"
        placeholder="Enter your email"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <ControlledRadioGroup
        name="role"
        label="Role"
        :options="roleOptions"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <ControlledInput
        v-if="form.values.role === 'contributor'"
        name="otherInfo"
        label="Other Info"
        placeholder="Describe your contribution"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <ControlledCheckbox
        name="newsletter"
        label="Subscribe to newsletter"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <ControlledRadioGroup
        v-if="form.values.newsletter"
        name="frequency"
        label="Newsletter Frequency"
        :options="frequencyOptions"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <ControlledTextarea
        name="bio"
        label="Bio"
        placeholder="Tell us about yourself..."
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />
    </FormFields>

    <FormActions v-slot="{ form: formCtx, isValid }" class="mt-6">
      <Button
        type="submit"
        class="w-full"
        :disabled="!isValid || formCtx?.isSubmitting.value"
      >
        Submit
      </Button>
    </FormActions>
  </Form>
</template>

runs.output_code:
<script setup lang="ts">
import { Button, ControlledCheckbox, ControlledInput, ControlledRadioGroup, ControlledTextarea, Form, FormActions, FormFields } from "elements";
import { registrationSchema, registrationInitialValues, type RegistrationFormValues } from "../types";

const roleOptions = [
  { value: "user", label: "User" },
  { value: "admin", label: "Admin" },
  { value: "contributor", label: "Contributor" },
];

const frequencyOptions = [
  { value: "daily", label: "Daily" },
  { value: "weekly", label: "Weekly" },
  { value: "monthly", label: "Monthly" },
];

const actions = {
  onSubmit: async (values: RegistrationFormValues) => {
    console.log("Form submitted:", values);
    return values;
  },
};
</script>

<template>
  <Form :initial-values="registrationInitialValues" :form-schema="registrationSchema" :actions="actions">
    <FormFields v-slot="{ form, resetGeneralError }">
      <!-- username: required, min 3 chars -->
      <ControlledInput
        name="username"
        label="Username"
        placeholder="Enter your username (min 3 characters)"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- email: required, valid email -->
      <ControlledInput
        name="email"
        label="Email"
        type="email"
        placeholder="Enter your email"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- role: options user, admin, contributor -->
      <ControlledRadioGroup
        name="role"
        label="Role"
        :options="roleOptions"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- otherInfo: visible only when role === "contributor" -->
      <ControlledInput
        v-if="form.values.role === 'contributor'"
        name="otherInfo"
        label="Other Info (Contributor Info)"
        placeholder="Describe your contribution"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- newsletter: checkbox -->
      <ControlledCheckbox
        name="newsletter"
        label="Subscribe to newsletter"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- frequency: visible only when newsletter is true -->
      <ControlledRadioGroup
        v-if="form.values.newsletter"
        name="frequency"
        label="Newsletter Frequency"
        :options="frequencyOptions"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- bio: optional textarea -->
      <ControlledTextarea
        name="bio"
        label="Bio (Optional)"
        placeholder="Tell us about yourself"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />
    </FormFields>

    <FormActions v-slot="{ form, isValid }">
      <Button
        type="submit"
        :disabled="!isValid || form?.isSubmitting.value"
      >
        Register
      </Button>
    </FormActions>
  </Form>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { Button, ControlledCheckbox, ControlledInput, ControlledRadioGroup, ControlledTextarea, Form, FormActions, FormFields } from "elements";
import { registrationSchema, registrationInitialValues, type RegistrationFormValues } from "@/registration/types";

const actions = {
  onSubmit: async (values: RegistrationFormValues) => {
    console.log("Form submitted:", values);
    return values;
  },
};
</script>

<template>
  <Form :initial-values="registrationInitialValues" :form-schema="registrationSchema" :actions="actions">
    <FormFields v-slot="{ form, resetGeneralError }">
      <!-- username: required, min 3 chars -->
      <ControlledInput
        name="username"
        label="Username"
        placeholder="Enter your username (min 3 characters)"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- email: required, valid email -->
      <ControlledInput
        name="email"
        label="Email"
        type="email"
        placeholder="Enter your email"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- role: options user, admin, contributor -->
      <ControlledRadioGroup
        name="role"
        label="Role"
        :options="["user", "admin", "contributor"]"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- otherInfo: visible only when role === "contributor" -->
      <ControlledInput
        v-if="form.values.role === 'contributor'"
        name="otherInfo"
        label="Other Info (Contributor Info)"
        placeholder="Describe your contribution"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- newsletter: checkbox -->
      <ControlledCheckbox
        name="newsletter"
        label="Subscribe to newsletter"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- frequency: visible only when newsletter is true -->
      <ControlledRadioGroup
        v-if="form.values.newsletter"
        name="frequency"
        label="Newsletter Frequency"
        :options="["daily", "weekly", "monthly"]"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- bio: optional textarea -->
      <ControlledTextarea
        name="bio"
        label="Bio (Optional)"
        placeholder="Tell us about yourself"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />
    </FormFields>

    <FormActions v-slot="{ form, isValid }">
      <Button
        type="submit"
        :disabled="!isValid || form?.isSubmitting.value"
      >
        Register
      </Button>
    </FormActions>
  </Form>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { Button, ControlledCheckbox, ControlledInput, ControlledRadioGroup, ControlledTextarea, Form, FormActions, FormFields } from "elements";
import { registrationSchema, registrationInitialValues, type RegistrationFormValues } from "./types";

const roleOptions = [
  { value: "user", label: "User" },
  { value: "admin", label: "Admin" },
  { value: "contributor", label: "Contributor" },
];

const frequencyOptions = [
  { value: "daily", label: "Daily" },
  { value: "weekly", label: "Weekly" },
  { value: "monthly", label: "Monthly" },
];

const actions = {
  onSubmit: async (values: RegistrationFormValues) => {
    console.log("Form submitted:", values);
    return values;
  },
};
</script>

<template>
  <Form :initial-values="registrationInitialValues" :form-schema="registrationSchema" :actions="actions">
    <FormFields v-slot="{ form, resetGeneralError }">
      <!-- username: required, min 3 chars -->
      <ControlledInput
        name="username"
        label="Username"
        placeholder="Enter your username (min 3 characters)"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- email: required, valid email -->
      <ControlledInput
        name="email"
        label="Email"
        type="email"
        placeholder="Enter your email"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- role: options user, admin, contributor -->
      <ControlledRadioGroup
        name="role"
        label="Role"
        :options="roleOptions"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- otherInfo: visible only when role === "contributor" -->
      <ControlledInput
        v-if="form.values.role === 'contributor'"
        name="otherInfo"
        label="Other Info (Contributor Info)"
        placeholder="Describe your contribution"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- newsletter: checkbox -->
      <ControlledCheckbox
        name="newsletter"
        label="Subscribe to newsletter"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- frequency: visible only when newsletter is true -->
      <ControlledRadioGroup
        v-if="form.values.newsletter"
        name="frequency"
        label="Newsletter Frequency"
        :options="frequencyOptions"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- bio: optional textarea -->
      <ControlledTextarea
        name="bio"
        label="Bio (Optional)"
        placeholder="Tell us about yourself"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />
    </FormFields>

    <FormActions v-slot="{ form, isValid }">
      <Button
        type="submit"
        :disabled="!isValid || form?.isSubmitting.value"
      >
        Register
      </Button>
    </FormActions>
  </Form>
</template>
